productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boy Check Red Shirt
description: Composition Red and white checked shirt with blue accents, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with a buttoned flap, tipped collar, buttoned front placket, patch pockets with one buttoned flap on either side of the chest, yoke at the back with a loop, stitch detailing, embroidery on the left chest and back and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Let your little boy learn to play Basketball in style with this checked shirt from doodle. Teach him the game and sporting spirit, while the cotton fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and sports shoes for an even more sporty look.
